# generated by Claude!!
include(FetchContent)
FetchContent_Declare(
    googletest
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/google/googletest.git
    GIT_TAG        v1.14.0
)

# prevent GoogleTest from overriding our compiler/linker settings
set(gtest_force_shared_crt ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(googletest)

include(GoogleTest)

# ── Helper macro: one call registers a test executable ────────────────────────
macro(dg_add_test TEST_NAME SOURCE_FILE)
    add_executable(${TEST_NAME} ${SOURCE_FILE})
    target_include_directories(${TEST_NAME} PRIVATE ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/headers)
    target_link_libraries(${TEST_NAME} PRIVATE
        GTest::gtest_main
        TNL::TNL
        Eigen3::Eigen)
    target_compile_options(${TEST_NAME} PRIVATE -O0 -g)
    gtest_discover_tests(${TEST_NAME}
        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
endmacro()

dg_add_test(test_reference_element test_reference_element.cpp)
dg_add_test(test_mesh              test_mesh.cpp)
dg_add_test(test_operator          test_operator.cpp)
dg_add_test(test_rk4               test_rk4.cpp)
